en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: WITH STRINGED INSTRUMENTS. A MASKIL OF DAVID, WHEN THE ZIPHITES WENT AND TOLD SAUL, "IS NOT DAVID HIDING AMONG US?" O God, save me, by your name, and vindicate me by your might.
zh: 神啊！求你因你的名拯救我， 求你以你的大能為我伸冤。

en: O God, hear my prayer; give ear to the words of my mouth.
zh: 神啊！求你垂聽我的禱告， 留心聽我口中的言語。

en: For strangers have risen against me; ruthless men seek my life; they do not set God before themselves. Selah
zh: 因為傲慢的人 起來攻擊我， 強橫的人尋索我的性命； 他們不把 神放在眼裡。

en: Behold, God is my helper; the Lord is the upholder of my life.
zh: 看哪！ 神是我的幫助； 主是扶持我性命的。

en: He will return the evil to my enemies; in your faithfulness put an end to them.
zh: 願災禍報應在我仇敵的身上； 願你因你的信實消滅他們。

en: With a freewill offering I will sacrifice to you; I will give thanks to your name, O LORD, for it is good.
zh: 我要甘心情願獻祭給你； 耶和華啊！我必稱讚你的名， 因你的名是美好的。

en: For he has delivered me from every trouble, and my eye has looked in triumph on my enemies.
zh: 他救我脫離了一切患難； 我親眼看見了我的仇敵滅亡。
